<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

changes = []
for r in range(len(before)):
    for c in range(len(before[r])):
        if before[r][c] != after[r][c]:
            changes.append((r, c, before[r][c], after[r][c]))

print(f"Number of changed cells: {len(changes)}")
for r, c, old, new in changes:
    print(f"  ({r}, {c}): {old} -> {new}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
